highlights.summary:
Established in February 2002, Academy for Clinical Excellence (ACE) is an initiative of Pfizer India Ltd. in partnership with Indian Pharmaceutical Association Maharashtra State Branch (IPAMSB) and Suven Life Sciences Ltd. It is the first clinical research training institute in India and is conceived as a one-stop-shop for the training needs of all clinical research students. It is located inside the Bombay College of Pharmacy premises.

Faculty members of the institute are experienced as well as highly qualified. They belong from various pharmaceutical companies and academia. They conduct courses and develop training modules. Faculty members are a part of the Curriculum Panel (CP) and an Executive Curriculum Committee (ECC) of Academy for Clinical Excellence.

Academy for Clinical Excellence offers four courses, namely Customised courses, PG diploma, Certificates and e-Learning programmes. The institute offers customised programmes in clinical research. In collaboration with Edutech, which a leading technology-based learning and information solutions provider, Academy for Clinical Excellence offers an e-Learning programme in Clinical Research.

Academy for Clinical Excellence offers PG diploma and certificate courses. PG diploma is offered in one specialisation and comprises six modules. Certificate course is offered in eight specialisations and the institute is working on introducing three more specialisations. faqs.question: Are admissions at HIMT College (Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training) entrance-based or merit-based?

It is a national-level common entrance test for admission to various courses offered at IMU campuses conducted by Indian Maritime University. The candidates who clear the entrance exam are called for their psychometric test, medical examination followed by panel interview and pre-sea training. Only after clearing all these stages, the candidate is eligible to take admission in HIMT college.

reviews.review_heading: HIMT excels in training.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure during the course are phenomenal, with Wi-Fi. Classrooms, and labs equipped with the latest technology. Food quality is great. Hostel, canteen, medical, and sports facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely worthy to join HIMT. HIMT teaches us to tackle loneliness, homesickness, and challenges.
reviews.review_text: In our whole campus, accommodation is provided, an academic block, a galley (mess room), turf for playing football, cricket, basketball, a ground for volleyball, a library, and each class has a maximum space of 40 students, with smart board facility as well as AC provided there.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent facilities and instructors.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in HIMT. It includes all the required departments, like we have a VR lab, library, seamanship lab, workshop, turf for playing cricket, football, pickleball, badminton, and basketball. The quality of food is good, and the hostel has very good infrastructure, and there is an indoor sports room on each floor of the E block.

reviews.review_heading: Asia's top maritime college.
reviews.review_text: About infrastructure, it was very spacious and green campus. Everything that we had, like a hostel room, swimming, computer lab, Seamen ship lab, was built with world-class technology, and they have a VR simulator which made us learn with real-life situations.

reviews.review_heading: GME course from HIMT is a pathway to a successful career.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, you get a sharing room space. You get your own bed, cot, pillow, and all covers, one study table and chair each, and one cupboard space. You also get all toiletries, uniforms, and books on campus. The fees are inclusive of all this. Mess is also provided, where you get meals three times a day and coffee and tea twice a day.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college for GME in India.
reviews.review_text: We have various labs like the Basic Skills Workshop, where we do hot works, welding and gas cutting, fitting, plumbing, lathe, etc. We have an Auxiliary Machines Workshop with equipment like pumps, valves, air compressors, heat exchangers, purifiers, pistons, lines, crankshafts, etc. We also have a fully equipped Electrical Lab, an operational ship on campus, and a VR lab.

reviews.review_heading: I get placed in MMSI through HIMT after completing GME.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are excellent. We have a world-class sports complex including a basketball court, football turf, cricket turf, pickleball courts, swimming pool, laundry service, separate hostels for boys and girls, a ship on campus, state-of-the-art virtual reality labs, and many more. The hostel can accommodate around 800 cadets.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college for B.Tech Marine Engineering.
reviews.review_text: We have a ship on campus, where we get to see and operate all the live machinery that is available on board a ship. We also have a state-of-the-art facility, which is our virtual reality lab, where we have fully immersive ship visits. Apart from this, we have a swimming pool, sports turf and complex, air-conditioned classrooms, good hostels, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My success story as B.Tech Marine Engineering Cadet.
reviews.review_text: We have about 14 acres of greenery-filled campus with all the advanced facilities like dedicated hostel blocks for girls and boys, swimming pool facilities, gym, sports turf for football and cricket, virtual reality labs, smart classrooms with AC, ship in campus and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Do B.Tech in Marine Engineering only at HIMT College.
reviews.review_text: HIMT College is a green, lush campus. It spread across 15 acres of land with dedicated academic blocks. It also has hostel blocks, labs and workshops, a mess area that accommodates 400 at a time, an auditorium with centralized AC, a well-equipped gym, a swimming pool, and a sports complex. All facilities required for training and recreation are available within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college for B.Tech Marine Engineering.
reviews.review_text: At HIMT College, nobody can beat the infrastructure. We have all the latest equipment and advanced technologies for maritime training. Whether it is digital innovation or physical equipment, HIMT College has it all, with smartboards and AC in all classrooms and labs.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the experience was really good, and I am really happy and thankful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is really good, and also there are all the necessary labs like BSW, ASW, electrical, and automation labs. There is also a ship on the campus (SIC) which gives the experience of the ship with the actual engine room and bridge.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive and industry-ready training for aspiring Electro-Technical Officers.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the ETO course at HIMT are designed to meet international maritime training standards. Our institute is well-regarded for its emphasis on providing a holistic student experience, including excellent hostel, mess, medical, and recreational facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am feeling proud to study in HIMT college, where the faculty members and batchmates are helpful.
reviews.review_text: The ambiance of HIMT feels good and peaceful. Classrooms are provided with air conditioning facilities, and my college has a VR lab facility. Every week, there will be two periods for the library, and the books in the library are useful. Cadets from any state in India can have good food and feel good with the facilities of the hostel. Indoor and outdoor sports facilities are available, and we can play every evening.

reviews.review_heading: HIMT is one of the best platforms to pursue your career as a Marine.
reviews.review_text: Our college consists of a beautiful environment with modern labs like AMW, BSW Seamanship Lab, Electrical Lab, Automation Lab, Virtual Reality Lab, ER Resource Lab, Ship Simulator, etc. The Ship in Campus provides a real shipboard machinery experience, which helps to boost your knowledge.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT)

The best part of HIMT about the placements is their placement cell do not forget their students in case they pass out of the college without placements.

college_info.college_name: HIMT Chennai Scholarship Details

paragraphs: HIMT Chennai offers nearly 15 types of scholarships to make education accessible to students from all economic strata. Some of the Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training scholarships are explained in a brief below:

Every year, several scholarships are awarded to students from the low-income group who record meritorious academic performance continuously and demonstrate economic needs. Madhurika Educational and Charitable trust has instituted three such scholarships for GP Rating students with the objective to provide financial support to them. Each student pursuing the GP Rating course is granted an amount of Rs 25,000.
The Institute offers 50% waiver on tuition fees to the students whose parent has been martyred while in the service of Indian Armed Forces (Army/ Navy/ Airforce).
A waiver of INR 25,000 on tuition fee is available for all female candidates across all courses.

HIMT has taken an initiative to be a part of the skill development mission for Lakshadweep administration. Candidates with a proof of their nativity from Lakshadweep can pursue GP Rating course for INR 1,35,000.

college_info.college_name: Rayat Bahra Group of Institutes, Ropar Campus: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview:
Rayat Bahra Group of Institutes, Ropar Campus is a private institute, established in 2001 in Ropar, Punjab. Rayat Bahra Group of Institutes, Ropar Campus is approved by AICTE, NCTE and PCI and offers a total of 60 courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in 13 specialisations such as Agriculture, Automobile Engineering, Chemistry, Civil Engineering and Computer Science. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. in both Full Time and Part Time modes. Rayat Bahra Group of Institutes, Ropar Campus fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 46,000 to 3,23,400. Rayat Bahra Group of Institutes, Ropar Campus has an annual seat intake of 2569 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Law. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.review_title: Faculty is good, infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: There are 60 students in my course, but the college has 120 students overall, so there are two sections of 60 each. The placements were also good, with an average package of 5 lakh per annum. Companies that came for placements include Sun Pharma, Centrient Pharmaceuticals, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent in this college. Wi-Fi is available both in the college and in the hostel, with high-speed internet. Classrooms and labs are equipped with advanced technology. The hostel mess provides good food, and there are three canteens on campus: one CCD, one juice corner, and one tuck shop.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the Bachelor's degree, but I don't recommend it for master's degree.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students got placed in our course of batch 2021. 3 LPA is the highest package offered. The lowest package is about 2 LPA, and the average package is 2.5 LPA. Wipro, Trident, TCS, Asian Paints, BYJU's, etc., came here. 75% of students got internships in Wipro, BYJU's etc. The others got in small or local companies. Manager and assistant manager roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in our college with a good speed. Big machines are available in labs for pharmacy students. Separate libraries are available for different departments. The quality of food is the best in the hostel. Games and sports facilities are not available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The 2014 batch of ECE branch was awesome.

review_content.Placements: During our placements, many famous companies visited our college for the placements. Those companies were Flipkart, Tech Mahindra, Google, Helli Labs, and others. About 30% of students were placed from our electronics and communication batch because half of the students did not take place in the placement drives. The highest salary package provided by the companies was 18 LPA. Almost all students of our batch got internships during the six months of their industrial training. Some students even got paid internships. The college provided the best course for networking, marketing, data science, and data analysis.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Almost 85% of the students scored good marks. If your any elder brother or sister is also studying in this college, then they give you extra marks. The role offered is pharmacist accountant.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is average. The food of the mess is of very poor quality, and there is less cleaning in the hostel. There are no lights on the road, which causes a problem in the night to walk. Medical facilities are average, but there are many canteens on the campus.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, but they judge students by their money but not by their knowledge. Teaching quality is very low. The director of our college does not want to talk with students and does not listen to students' problems.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a good campus for studies.

review_content.Placements: Due to the COVID-19 pandemic situation, not many companies gave placement opportunities to students. So, only a few students got placed. As per I know, the highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.2 LPA. Only 5% to 10% of the students got internships from here. Main roles offered by this course are programmer and coding expert for website designing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are great for every department. All the classrooms, libraries and labs are in good condition. The entire campus is hygienic and clean. The hostel also provides good facilities, and the food served is also good. There is a variety of food items on a weekly basis. Sports are also good as there are teams for many games like cricket, badminton and football.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides good knowledge, and it is value for money paid.

review_content.Placements: At our time, only a few companies visited our college to provide placements for the students. Few students got a placement with an average salary package. One of those company which provided placements at that time for students was HCL.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms facilities were pretty good. The college does not provide any medical and canteen facilities. We can only buy tea on campus at that time. The college provided football and kabbadi games for students. Faculty available for sports were also very good and experienced.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good, infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent in this college. Wi-Fi is available both in the college and in the hostel, with high-speed internet. Classrooms and labs are equipped with advanced technology. The hostel mess provides good food, and there are three canteens on campus: one CCD, one juice corner, and one tuck shop.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the Bachelor's degree, but I don't recommend it for master's degree.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college with a good speed. Big machines are available in labs for pharmacy students. Separate libraries are available for different departments. The quality of food is the best in the hostel. Games and sports facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: The 2014 batch of ECE branch was awesome.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Ropar campus was very calm and peaceful. All departments were well-constructed with a separate lawn where the students can study, play and enjoy their free time. All classrooms are neat and clean. The library of Rayat Bahra Ropar Campus is very well-organised, where you can receive  4 books at a time. There is also an e-library, where students can prepare for their placements. All computers, electronics and mechanical labs are good. Faculty do all type of practicals rel...

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Everything is average. The food of the mess is of very poor quality, and there is less cleaning in the hostel. There are no lights on the road, which causes a problem in the night to walk. Medical facilities are average, but there are many canteens on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good campus for studies.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are great for every department. All the classrooms, libraries and labs are in good condition. The entire campus is hygienic and clean. The hostel also provides good facilities, and the food served is also good. There is a variety of food items on a weekly basis. Sports are also good as there are teams for many games like cricket, badminton and football.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good knowledge, and it is value for money paid.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms facilities were pretty good. The college does not provide any medical and canteen facilities. We can only buy tea on campus at that time. The college provided football and kabbadi games for students. Faculty available for sports were also very good and experienced.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college was good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was aesthetic. The food quality in the mess was also good. There was a gym, indoor game room. Laboratories were maintained and cleaned. Wi-Fi and electricity facility (24*7) was provided. Library was always open for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Great ! Great and Great ! Go for Rayat !
reviews.review_text: College Infrastructure was Good. Faculty and staff was good. College Mess was also too clean. Quality of food was also very good and at very reasonable price. College management always motivates students for sports and extra activities in college and out of college too.

reviews.review_heading: The college experience was too good, and placement is your task.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Rayat always maintains its decorum. The availability of labs was less at that time, but now it is all set with all needed instruments which helps the students to prepare practically as well. College also provides the facility of the hostel, which was also a part of great college life within the college. Moreover, it offers different types of playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Extraordinary teaching skills.
reviews.review_text: The college also provides high-speed Wi-Fi with modern laptops and the level of labs is very high and high tech Wi-Fi is used for doing projects works very fastly due to high-speed acceleration and the computer room is enabled with apple laptops and accessories. Whereas hostel of the college is highly maintained food gives home like feelings.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is pretty good. There is an open campus and you can sit in groups.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very well maintained. Our college organizes a lot of seminars which gives practical knowledge to all of the students. Due to these seminars students get the information about the things which industries expect from us as a fresher. Our college organizes fest and fresher's party every year which gives opportunities to the students with different interests and talent. Teachers of our college are very supporting and always encourages the students to do their best and t...

reviews.review_heading: Placements in the college and the college environment were good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. The campus was lush- green and spread over a large area with direct connectivity to the highway, which makes it easier for students to reach on time. Labs and other classroom infrastructure were also good with all the facilities except elevators.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, and it provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities. The college has provided Jio Wi-Fi in every room, and CCTV cameras and a big library are also available.  The college has 2 grounds for playing. Quality of labs is not that good. In every lab, there are at least 1 or 2 machines which are not working. Quality of classrooms is good with proper lighting and fans. There is a canteen available in college and the quality of food served is good enough. Hostel rooms are clean and very fresh. They also provide study ...

reviews.review_heading: Best college in whole Punjab.
reviews.review_text: College is really beautiful from and also from inside as well. Awesome gardens and really big football which also used for cricket tournaments, sports event and for some college events too. And. Auditorium not really big but its is big enough for B.Tech students to sit and also have air conditioning all in all it is good enough. Hostel I tell guys you gona love the best thing in the whole college or will sy best in Punjab it located little far from study area in the college so 10 min walk daily ...

reviews.review_heading: Loved to be a part of RIEIT, Ropar Campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good, the was like on the backside you see Mountains and on the Front side there is a River due to which the weather used to cool at all times. There was separate blocks/buildings for different streams of Engineering, also there was a separate building for Law college and Polytechnic college. Also a large Playground + Canteens.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in Pulmonary Medicine - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, placements, facilities, and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In government medical colleges, placements are not as formal as in engineering and management courses. The top hospitals and healthcare organizations that offer positions to MD Respiratory Medicine graduates include corporate and multi-specialty hospitals, private chest and super-specialty clinics, and others. Top roles include chest physician, critical care specialist, medical advisor, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are well-maintained, with dedicated respiratory medical wards and ICUs available. Sleep labs, bronchoscopy suites, and PFT labs are also accessible. A well-equipped radiology and pathology department is present. Hostels and mess facilities are good and available for the PGs.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in Pulmonary Medicine - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is not to the mark, but facilities are better.

review_content.Placements: In this college, you cannot expect anything. Everything depends on your hard work and dedication, which makes you strong when you face the society. Students should come forward to internships as our college doesn't help in any way. They should be brave enough.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not up to the mark and can't expect from a government college. Food is much better as compared to other government colleges. Medical facilities are very good for students. Classrooms have to be renovated.

individual_reviews.course: MD in Pulmonary Medicine - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, placements, facilities, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: In government medical colleges, placements are not as formal as in engineering and management courses. The top hospitals and healthcare organizations that offer positions to MD Respiratory Medicine graduates include corporate and multi-specialty hospitals, private chest and super-specialty clinics, and others. Top roles include chest physician, critical care specialist, medical advisor, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are well-maintained, with dedicated respiratory medical wards and ICUs available. Sleep labs, bronchoscopy suites, and PFT labs are also accessible. A well-equipped radiology and pathology department is present. Hostels and mess facilities are good and available for the PGs.

individual_reviews.course: MD in Pulmonary Medicine - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is not to the mark, but facilities are better.

content.Placements: In this college, you cannot expect anything. Everything depends on your hard work and dedication, which makes you strong when you face the society. Students should come forward to internships as our college doesn't help in any way. They should be brave enough.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not up to the mark and can't expect from a government college. Food is much better as compared to other government colleges. Medical facilities are very good for students. Classrooms have to be renovated.

answer.text: The Excel College of Pharmacy was established in the year 2017 under the auspices of SRET – Sri Rengaswamy Educational Trust. The College is recognised by the Government of Tamil Nadu and affiliated with The Tamil Nadu Dr. MGR Medical University, Chennai, approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), New Delhi. It has started its niche in professional education in the name of Excel Group Institutions at Pallakapalayam, Namakkal District. These magnificent institutions are located in a sprawling area of over 90 acres beside National Highway (NH544), between Salem and Coimbatore. The College is housed for academic preference in a campus with an impressive building and the most conducive atmosphere.

faqs.question: Is Excel College of Pharmacy a good College?

answer.text: Excel College of Pharmacy was established in 2017, Located in Namakkal, Tamil Nadu. Excel College of Pharmacy offers state-of-the-art infrastructure. The institute offers facilities such as a library, conference halls, laboratories, etc. to students. Some of the facilities offered at Excel College of Pharmacy are mentioned below:Computer and Internet Laboratory: The computer lab with unlimited internet access with 50Mbps bandwidth provides students with information on online tools for education and co-curriculum needs.Hostel Facility: The college provides hostel facilities for all of its residential programmes. Excel College of Pharmacy has separate hostels for boys and girls.Library Facility: Excel College of Pharmacy Library has a Montessori lab which includes a vast collection of books, journals, magazines, and other resources. The college also offers e-resources to students.Medical And Emergency Services: The college has provided students and staff with a medical facility within the campus. MOU has been signed with Sudha Hospital, which is located 20 km away from the college.Sport and Gymnasium Facility: The campus now features a spacious outdoor area suitable for cricket, volleyball, and football.Museum: The College's museum boasts a collection of over 100 crude drugs, botanical specimens, medicinal plant slides, and patent medicine containers.

reviews_list.review_title: Life after 12th- Life of college Degrees of Pharmacy .

review_content.Placements: 120 students are there in each class. Placements are not good. No roles are offered. Less initiative is taken in our college for extra curricular activities. As heard from seniors, no internships are provided. There are no sufficient activities .
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms do not have individual projectors and backup. We have no big canteen. Library does not have sufficient books. Mess is not good, hostel people complain about it. There is no perfection of exams. There is no syllabus completion before semester. No sufficient light is available. Ground is good.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college campus is good, and you can get all services.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not have a high placement rate. The highest salary package offered is between 8-9 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is between 2-3 LPA, and the average salary package offered is between 5-6 LPA. Many companies visit here for the course like some local companies as permanent, and some private companies also offer placements. The top salary package offered is 12 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for the course are required to at least complete a degree. Wi-Fi is not available, but the library is available. Classrooms are clean and big, and sports and games are also available. There are 2 canteens, i.e., one for local students and one for hostel students.

reviews_list.review_title: Review from my POV of Siddhant college of pharmacy, Pune.

review_content.Placements: Placements are provided. Most of the students opt for the higher studies. So only few go for the placements. The highest package is 4LPA for degree students. Internship is not offered. You've to find it out by your own. The college gives you specific time period for the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a hostel facility in the campus. Seperate boys and girls hostel. There are 2 mess available 1 canteen 1 bank and 1 ATM and 1 cafe too. The food not finger liking but good and eatable. There is a Wi-Fi facility available in the hostel on each floor and the cleaning staff and washing machines also available.

Nobody bothers to clean them, yet students are forced to attend the lectures. The pharmacy college has a computer lab with 25 computers. It also has Wi-Fi, but this lab is sometimes shared with engineering students. The library has a limited number of books, so students must grab them before anyone else. The library is quiet and clean but no...

reviews.review_heading: Life after 12th- Life of college Degrees of Pharmacy .
reviews.review_text: Classrooms do not have individual projectors and backup. We have no big canteen. Library does not have sufficient books. Mess is not good, hostel people complain about it. There is no perfection of exams. There is no syllabus completion before semester. No sufficient light is available. Ground is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college campus is good, and you can get all services.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for the course are required to at least complete a degree. Wi-Fi is not available, but the library is available. Classrooms are clean and big, and sports and games are also available. There are 2 canteens, i.e., one for local students and one for hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: Review from my POV of Siddhant college of pharmacy, Pune.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel facility in the campus. Seperate boys and girls hostel. There are 2 mess available 1 canteen 1 bank and 1 ATM and 1 cafe too. The food not finger liking but good and eatable. There is a Wi-Fi facility available in the hostel on each floor and the cleaning staff and washing machines also available.
